decisions.rationale: borealis status bar calls nifm every frame; TRUST-03 maintained
GLFW glfwInit fails in applet mode on fw 21.1.0
Safe ceiling for both applet and application mode
Fixes borealis pthread task loop crash in NRO context (prior session)

decisions.decision: setPadding moved from m_scrollFrame to m_listContainer
decisions.rationale: borealis ScrollingFrame.setPadding calls fatal() -> throws std::logic_error -> uncaught = Instruction Abort on Switch
User requested generic icon; castle motif, Royal Sapphire palette; wired via --icon= in elf2nro

decisions.decision: hbmenu crash (folder_icon.bin null deref) is unrelated
decisions.rationale: hbmenu-internal bug, not caused by our NRO

decisions.decision: Removed wrong hash check in nsp.cpp: memcmp(sha256_hash, content_id, 16)
decisions.rationale: NCA content IDs are NOT SHA-256 hashes; NCM verifies integrity internally; this check failed every install immediately

decisions.decision: m_installComplete changed to std::atomic<bool> in install_view.hpp
decisions.rationale: Plain bool is a data race — install thread writes, main thread reads

decisions.decision: Added m_hasTransitioned guard + m_updateTask->stop() before transitionToSummary()
decisions.rationale: Without guard, UIUpdateTask fires every 100ms after install completes, pushing unlimited SummaryView activities onto borealis stack -> null deref crash at ~43% offset in binary (borealis activity management)

next_action: Review hardware test results from user. Watch switchpalace_debug.log for: 'install: starting install thread' -> 'install: thread complete' -> 'install: transitionToSummary called' (exactly once). If pass: remove debug logging (fbDebugLog in file_browser.cpp, debugLog in main.cpp, ivLog in install_view.cpp), write 01-03-SUMMARY.md. If crash: analyze new Atmosphere logs and fix.
context_notes: Three crash rounds total. Round 1 (session 1): pthread task loop crash fixed with USE_STD_THREAD=ON. Round 2 (session 2): ScrollingFrame.setPadding calls NO_PADDING macro -> fatal() -> std::logic_error. Round 3 (session 3, this session): Install crash from Atmosphere log offset analysis — Data Abort at 0x0, X[0]=null, crash in borealis activity management code (~43% of 1.9MB binary). Three bugs fixed: (1) wrong hash check in nsp.cpp failed all installs immediately, (2) plain bool data race on m_installComplete, (3) no guard on transitionToSummary caused borealis activity stack corruption. Debug logging (fbDebugLog/debugLog/ivLog) still present — remove after confirmed working.
